allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -d ProductoGx16 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME, TABLE_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE='VIEW' AND \(TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Mtd%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Pgm%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%BT%'\) ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;" -W)
Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -d ProductoGx16 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT TOP 3 * FROM BTI001;" -W)
Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.databases ORDER BY name;" -W)

Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT TABLE_CATALOG, TABLE_NAME FROM ProductoGx16.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Mtd%' UNION ALL SELECT TABLE_CATALOG, TABLE_NAME FROM bibankdesa.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Mtd%' UNION ALL SELECT TABLE_CATALOG, TABLE_NAME FROM btgx16mbt.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Mtd%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;" -W)

Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT TABLE_CATALOG, TABLE_NAME FROM ProductoGx16.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Mtd%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%mtd%';" -W)

Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -d ProductoGx16 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'BTI019' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION; SELECT TOP 5 BTINom, BTISrvNom, BTIMtdNom, BTISrvParNom, BTISrvParDir, BTISrvVarTipo, BTISrvCat, BTISrvCatIt, BTISrvParItTipo, BTISrvParLargo FROM BTI019 WHERE BTIMtdNom = 'SimularPrestamo';" -W)

Bash(sqlcmd -S SQLSERVER1,1433 -d ProductoGx16 -U productogx16 -P prodGx16 -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE 'BCC%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'BCT%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;" -W)
